---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea that keeps the package focused on text-scale reflow
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
---

**Problem**
What accessibility / overflow problem are you trying to solve?

**Proposed solution**
What would the API or behavior look like?

**Scope check**
This package deliberately stays narrow. Please confirm your request is *not*:

- [ ] font shrinking / auto-sizing / truncation
- [ ] width or device-type breakpoints
- [ ] theming, design tokens, or i18n
- [ ] native / platform-channel functionality

**Alternatives considered**
Other approaches or existing packages you looked at.
